title: Nephrodium × uliginosum
taxonomy: Nephrodium × uliginosum is a hybrid species, and as such, its classification can be complex. It is believed to be a cross between Nephrodium auriculatum and Nephrodium uliginosum. In terms of its classification, Nephrodium × uliginosum is often placed in the family Polypodiaceae, although some sources may group it differently. Further research is needed to fully understand the taxonomic status of this species. The classification of Nephrodium × uliginosum is still a topic of ongoing scientific study.
